title: pouteria izabalensis
intro: Pouteria izabalensis, also known as the Izabal mahogany or Izabal white-laurel, is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. It is a tree that is native to Central America and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The extracts of Pouteria izabalensis have been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is often used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions.
